name: Spiced Turkey Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon garlic powder or 2 cloves garlic, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together except the sour cream.
2. Form the mixture into a loaf and place it on a meat rack or use foil handles.
3. Cook the turkey loaf for 8 to 10 hours on Low heat, or 5 to 6 hours on High heat.
4. To ensure doneness, insert a meat thermometer into the loaf. The thermometer should read 180 degrees F.
5. Serve with sour cream if desired. Serves 8.
Note: Instructions for making foil handles are provided separately.
